summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgentERP application including backend APIs and frontend chat interface. All core functionalities working correctly in mock mode.

design_issues.issue: Example buttons (Create Sales Order, Check Customer) were not visible after chat messages were sent - they only appear in welcome state

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint returns correct status with mock mode
All agent orchestration endpoints (create_sales_order, check_customer, create_customer) working correctly
Chat interface loads with modern minimalist design using Manrope and Public Sans fonts
Chat input accepts text and sends messages successfully
Example buttons populate chat input correctly (when visible)
Sales order widget displays after successful creation with correct data (TechCorp Inc, LAPTOP-001, 2 units)
Customer widget displays after customer check operations
ERP status indicator correctly shows 'Mock Mode' with animated status dot
Toast notifications system is active and working
Chat messages are properly formatted (user vs assistant) with correct test IDs
Message parsing correctly extracts customer, items, and quantities from natural language
Backend API handles invalid intents gracefully
Chat message persistence working (save and retrieve)
Primary color scheme (Electric Indigo #4F46E5) properly implemented
Responsive design with sidebar visible on desktop
No error messages or console errors detected
